holdPhoneSteady: Hold Your Phone Steady While Sensor Data Is Initializing.
liveHeadingDetected: Live Heading Is Detected And Updating.
tapEnableCompass: Tap Enable Compass To Request Motion Sensor Permission.
allowMotionAccess: Allow Motion/Orientation Access In Browser Or App Settings.
deviceNoCompassSensor: This Device Does Not Expose A Compass Sensor In This Environment.
noOrientationEvents: No Orientation Events Were Received. Use Manual Mode Below.
usePhysicalCompass: Use A Physical Compass And Face The Manual Qibla Bearing.
checkInPrayersToSeeProgress: Check In Prayers To See Progress
noSurahsFound: No Surahs Found Matching Your Search.
startExploringTafsir: Start Exploring Tafsir To See Your History Here.
readListenContemplate: Read, Listen, And Contemplate The Words Of Allah.
searchBySurahNameOrNumber: Search By Surah Name Or Number...
thisHelpsPersonalizeExperience: This Helps Us Personalize Your Experience.
hijriDateAdjustmentDescription: Adjust The Islamic Calendar If The Moon Sighting Differs In Your Region.
prayerAlarmDescription: Turn this on to enable automatic Adhan play for your selected prayers.
prayerAlarmNote: Note: Turning this switch OFF will also disable all individual prayer toggles above.
prePrayerReminderDescription: Get Notified A Few Minutes Before Prayer
batteryOptimizationDescription: Disable For Noor Connect To Ensure Adhan Plays Reliably On Time
batteryOptimizationWarning: Some Phones (Samsung, Xiaomi, Etc.) May Block Background Adhan Unless You Disable Battery Optimization For This App.
menstrualModeDescription: Manage Prayer Reminders And Tracking During Your Cycle
pausePrayerRemindersDescription: Stops Scheduled Prayer Notifications While Active
pauseAutoQazaSyncDescription: Prevents Missed-Prayer Auto Addition While Active
menstrualModeNotes: This Feature Helps Manage App Behavior Only. Follow Your Own Fiqh Guidance Or Scholar For Rulings.
optimizationTip: Select 'Unrestricted' Or 'No Optimization' For Best Results.
adhanInstructions: Please Tap Anywhere In The App To Enable Adhan Audio If Blocked.
permissionWasDeniedApp: Permission Was Denied. Open Android Settings To Re-Enable.
permissionWasDeniedBrowser: Permission Was Blocked. Click The Lock Icon In Your Browser Address Bar.
allowAppNotificationsDescription: Allow Noor Connect To Send Prayer Time Alerts Even When The App Is Closed.
allowBrowserNotificationsDescription: Allow Browser Notifications For Prayer Reminders And Islamic Event Alerts.
openAndroidSettingsDescription: Go To Settings → Apps → Noor Connect → Notifications → Allow.
unblockInBrowserDescription: Click The 🔒 Lock Icon In The Address Bar → Site Settings → Notifications → Allow.
grantNotificationPermissionAbove: Grant Notification Permission Above To Unlock These Settings.
receiveRemindersDailyPrayerTimes: Receive Reminders For Daily Prayer Times
notificationHistoryDesc: View Your Recent Notification History And Manage Your Preferences.
aboutDescription: 100% Free, Open Source & Privacy-Focused. All Data Stored Locally On Your Device. No Accounts, No Tracking, No Ads.
fossMadeWithLove: FOSS - Made With Love For The Ummah
updateAvailableMessage: Version {version} is now available. Would you like to download it?
noUpdatesMessage: You have the latest version ({version}) installed.
qiblaDisclaimerLine1: The qibla feature is currently in development and may not be 100% accurate.
qiblaDisclaimerLine2: Please use a physical compass for religious obligations.
